description_long: This is a Timex wristwatch featuring a round, dark metallic case and a brown leather strap with white stitching. The dial is olive green with large, legible Arabic numerals in a cream color, and includes three subdials for chronograph functions, as well as a date window at the 4 o'clock position. The watch face is protected by a clear glass or acrylic crystal, and the case has two prominent pushers and a crown on the right side for adjusting time and chronograph settings. The strap is secured with a traditional buckle and has multiple adjustment holes for sizing. The watch is displayed on a black stand with the Timex logo, suggesting a retail or display context.
description: A Timex wristwatch with a round dark case, olive green chronograph dial, and brown leather strap with white stitching, displayed on a black stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full watch face, dial details, and Timex logo on the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and chronograph pushers.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the brown leather strap, stitching, and buckle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and strap curvature.
attribute_brand_logo: The Timex brand logo is printed in white, centered below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial, and also appears in white on the front of the black display stand.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is olive green with large Arabic numerals in cream, three subdials for chronograph functions, a date window at 4 o'clock, and white printed minute markers. The style is functional chronograph with clear, legible markings and a utilitarian aesthetic.
attribute_strap_type: Brown leather strap with white stitching, traditional two-piece construction, and multiple adjustment holes.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, and a date window. Luminous elements are present on the hands and hour markers.
